description: An EHS manager needs to generate the EPA's biennial hazardous waste report, summarizing all hazardous waste shipped from the site.

nodes.task_description: Query the system for all hazardous waste manifests from the reporting period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves a list of all waste shipments from the last two years.

nodes.task_description: Aggregate the data by waste code and quantity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly sums the total weight for each distinct EPA waste code.

nodes.task_description: Generate the report in the official EPA format.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the formatted report ready for submission.
